title: Admin can log in and land on admin dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can authenticate with NIP/NIS and password and is redirected to the admin dashboard showing admin-only content.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard
Verify admin dashboard summary stats are displayed

title: Teacher can record attendance for a class and date
description: Verifies a Guru can select a class and date, mark every student’s attendance, submit, and see a recorded confirmation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the attendance recording page
Select a valid date for attendance
Mark a valid attendance status for each student in the list
Verify a success confirmation is visible indicating attendance was recorded

title: Guru can log in and land on teacher dashboard
description: Verifies a teacher can authenticate and is redirected to the teacher dashboard showing teacher-only content.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the teacher dashboard
Verify the class list or attendance status overview is displayed

title: Siswa can log in and land on student dashboard
description: Verifies a student can authenticate and is redirected to the student dashboard showing student-only content.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the student dashboard
Verify attendance stats and a class leaderboard section are displayed

title: Teacher cannot submit attendance with incomplete student statuses
description: Verifies a Guru is prompted to complete required attendance entries before submission succeeds.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the attendance recording page
Select a valid date for attendance
Mark attendance status for only some students, leaving at least one student unmarked
Verify a validation prompt is visible requesting completion of required attendance entries

title: Admin can add a new student and see it appear in the list
description: Verifies an admin can create a student record through the UI and the new record appears in the student table.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open student management
Fill Test Siswa A into the student name field
Fill a unique valid NIS into the NIS field
Verify the new student appears in the student list

title: Teacher starts attendance workflow for a class from dashboard
description: Teacher can start attendance from a class card and is taken into the attendance recording workflow for that class.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the teacher dashboard
Click the action to start attendance for one class
Verify the attendance recording page is displayed for the selected class
Verify a student list with attendance status controls is available to be filled

title: Admin can add a new teacher record
description: Verifies an Admin can create a teacher and the new teacher appears in the teacher list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the teacher management page
Fill "Guru UI Test 1" into the teacher name field
Fill a unique valid NIP into the teacher identifier field
Verify the newly created teacher is visible in the teacher list

title: Admin views and filters leaderboard by class
description: Admin can open the leaderboard, view ranked results, apply a class filter, and see the ranking update to that class only.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the admin leaderboard
Select a class in the class filter
Verify the leaderboard table is displayed with ranked student rows
Verify the displayed leaderboard results reflect only the selected class

title: Admin can edit an existing teacher record
description: Verifies an Admin can update teacher data and the updated teacher appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the teacher management page
Fill "Guru Edit 1" into the teacher name field
Fill a unique valid NIP into the teacher identifier field
Open the edit form for the teacher named "Guru Edit 1"
Fill "Guru Edit 1 Updated" into the teacher name field
Verify the updated teacher name "Guru Edit 1 Updated" is visible in the teacher list

title: Admin can edit an existing student and see updated data in the list
description: Verifies an admin can update a student record via the edit form and the list reflects the change.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open student management
Fill Test Siswa Edit into the student name field
Fill a unique valid NIS into the NIS field
Open the edit form for the created student
Fill Test Siswa Edited into the student name field
Verify the student list shows the updated student name

title: Admin can delete a student and it disappears from the list
description: Verifies an admin can delete a student record and the student no longer appears in the student table.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open student management
Fill Test Siswa Delete into the student name field
Fill a unique valid NIS into the NIS field
Trigger delete for the created student
Verify the deleted student no longer appears in the student list

title: Admin dashboard shows stats, weekly attendance chart, and top leaderboard preview
description: Verifies the admin dashboard renders the key summary widgets and leaderboard preview for quick monitoring.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the admin dashboard
Verify stat cards and the weekly attendance chart are displayed
Verify a top leaderboard preview list is displayed

title: Admin can delete a teacher record
description: Verifies an Admin can delete a teacher and the teacher no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the teacher management page
Fill "Guru Hapus 1" into the teacher name field
Fill a unique valid NIP into the teacher identifier field
Confirm the deletion in the app confirmation UI
Verify the deleted teacher is no longer visible in the teacher list

title: Teacher dashboard shows class assignments and today attendance status
description: Teacher can open their dashboard and see summary stat cards plus assigned classes with each class's attendance status for today.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the teacher dashboard
Verify teacher dashboard stat cards are displayed
Verify assigned class cards are displayed with an attendance status for today

title: SPK criteria weights can be updated and saved by Admin
description: Verifies an Admin can edit SPK criteria weights, save them, and see the updated weights reflected on the page.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the SPK configuration page
Edit one SPK criterion weight to a different valid value
Verify a success confirmation is visible and the updated weight is reflected in the criteria list

title: Student dashboard shows attendance summary, chart, and top 5 class leaderboard
description: Student can open their dashboard and see their profile summary, attendance percentage/counts, monthly attendance chart, and top 5 class leaderboard.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the student dashboard
Verify the student profile summary card is displayed
Verify attendance summary stats, a monthly attendance chart, and a top class leaderboard section are displayed

title: Admin can search students by name or NIS
description: Verifies an admin can filter the student table using the search field and see matching results.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open student management
Fill Test Siswa Search into the student name field
Fill a unique valid NIS into the NIS field
Fill Test Siswa Search into the search field
Verify the student list shows the matching student and is filtered

title: Admin can search teachers by name or NIP
description: Verifies an Admin can filter the teacher list using search and only matching teachers are shown.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the teacher management page
Fill "Guru Cari 1" into the teacher name field
Fill a unique valid NIP into the teacher identifier field
Fill "Guru Cari 1" into the teacher search field
Verify the teacher list shows the matching teacher result

title: Student views class leaderboard and own rank context
description: Student can open the leaderboard page and see the class ranking list along with their own position context.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the student leaderboard
Verify the class leaderboard list/table is displayed
Verify the student's own rank context is displayed within the leaderboard view

title: SPK configuration blocks saving invalid weight totals
description: Verifies the Admin cannot save SPK criteria weights that violate validation rules and sees an instructive validation error.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the SPK configuration page
Edit SPK criterion weights so the total becomes invalid according to the page rules
Verify a validation error is visible indicating the weights must be corrected

title: Invalid credentials show a login error
description: Verifies a user entering an incorrect NIP/NIS or password cannot log in and sees an invalid-credentials error.

steps.description: Fill INVALID_USER into the NIP/NIS field
Fill INVALID_PASSWORD into the password field
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Teacher navigates to attendance recap from dashboard
description: Teacher can navigate from the dashboard to the recap page and see recap/report content or an empty state.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the teacher dashboard
Click the navigation to open attendance recap
Verify the teacher recap page is displayed
Verify recap content is shown or a clear empty state message is displayed

title: Admin dashboard quick action opens SPK configuration
description: Verifies an admin can use the dashboard quick action to reach SPK weight configuration.

steps.description: Click the dashboard quick action to open SPK configuration
Verify the SPK criteria configuration view is displayed

title: Student navigates from dashboard to attendance history
description: Student can move from the dashboard to the attendance history page and see their attendance records list or an empty state.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the student dashboard
Click the link to view attendance history
Verify the student attendance history view is displayed
Verify attendance history shows records or a clear empty state message

title: Admin sees validation when required teacher fields are missing
description: Verifies the add-teacher form blocks submission when required fields are empty and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the teacher management page
Submit the teacher form without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Admin dashboard can navigate to full leaderboard
description: Verifies an admin can navigate from the dashboard leaderboard preview to the full leaderboard page.

steps.description: Click the control to view the full leaderboard
Verify the admin leaderboard page is displayed

title: Student navigates from dashboard to full class leaderboard
description: Student can open the full leaderboard from the dashboard and see the same class ranking context on the leaderboard page.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the student dashboard
Click the link to view the full class leaderboard
Verify the student leaderboard page is displayed
Verify the class ranking list/table and the student's rank context are displayed

title: Admin exports current filtered leaderboard view to PDF
description: Admin can export the currently filtered leaderboard view to a PDF and sees an in-app PDF preview/opened document result.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the admin leaderboard
Select a class in the class filter
Click the export to PDF action
Verify a PDF preview or opened PDF view is presented to the user

title: Admin import workflow shows validation error for unsupported file type
description: Verifies the bulk import flow blocks unsupported file formats and shows a validation error before importing.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open student management
Select an unsupported file type in the file picker
Verify an import validation error is visible

title: Admin leaderboard handles empty state gracefully
description: Admin can open the leaderboard and, when no results are available, an empty state is shown instead of a broken table.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the admin leaderboard
Verify the page shows either ranked results or a clear empty state message
Verify the page remains usable with filters/export controls available or disabled appropriately

title: Password visibility toggle reveals and masks password input
description: Verifies the user can toggle password visibility on the login form without losing the entered value.

steps.description: Fill any valid-looking password into the password field
Toggle password visibility to reveal the password
Toggle password visibility to hide the password
Verify the password field still contains the entered value
